stemHtml: Why is the movement of individuals and aircraft being towed managed by tower controllers?

options.a: To regulate fuel consumption for aircraft operations.
options.b: To prevent unauthorized access to restricted areas on the airfield.
options.c: To prevent collisions between them and reduce the risk of collisions during taxiing, take-off, and landing.
options.d: To facilitate efficient loading and unloading of cargo and passengers onto aircraft.
